hooks.command: bash -c 'D="$PWD"; if [ -f "$D/docs/forge-state.json" ]; then STEP=$(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open(\"$D/docs/forge-state.json\")); print(d.get(\"current_step\",0))" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ -f "$D/docs/.observer-reviewing" ]; then AGE=$(python3 -c "import os,time; t=os.path.getmtime(\"$D/docs/.observer-reviewing\"); print(int(time.time()-t))" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "[FORGE] WAIT: Observer is reviewing (${AGE}s ago). Run: sleep 30 then check again with: cat docs/.observer-reviews.log | tail -5"; elif grep -q "NEEDS_FIX" "$D/docs/.observer-reviews.log" 2>/dev/null; then FIXES=$(grep -c "NEEDS_FIX" "$D/docs/.observer-reviews.log"); echo "[FORGE] OBSERVER FEEDBACK: $FIXES items need fixing. Read docs/.observer-reviews.log — fix all NEEDS_FIX items before continuing."; grep "NEEDS_FIX" "$D/docs/.observer-reviews.log" | tail -5; elif [ "$STEP" -lt 57 ]; then echo "[FORGE] AUTO-CONTINUE: Step $STEP/57 — No observer issues. Continue to next step immediately."; fi; fi'

bash -c 'D="$PWD"; C=$(test -f "$D/CLAUDE.md" && echo y || echo n); F=$(find "$D" -maxdepth 2 \( -name "*.py" -o -name "*.ts" \) ! -path "*node_modules*" ! -path "*.venv*" ! -path "*.git*" 2>/dev/null | head -1); P=$(grep -l "{{" "$D/CLAUDE.md" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$C" = "n" ] && [ -z "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE1_GREENFIELD"; elif [ "$C" = "n" ] && [ -n "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE7_BROWNFIELD"; elif [ -n "$P" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE1_GREENFIELD (placeholder)"; elif [ "$C" = "y" ] && [ -z "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE2_SPEC_ONLY"; elif [ "$C" = "y" ] && [ -n "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] EXISTING_PROJECT"; fi; if [ -f "$D/SPEC.md" ]; then RC=$(grep -oP "REQ-\d+" "$D/SPEC.md" 2>/dev/null | sort -u | wc -l); echo "[FORGE-SYNC] $RC REQs tracked."; fi'
bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm -rf|git push --force|git reset --hard|git clean -f"; then echo "[FORGE] BLOCKED: Destructive command" && exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'F="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; D="$PWD"; mkdir -p "$D/docs"; echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S) WRITE $F" >> "$D/docs/.builder-activity.log"; if echo "$F" | grep -q "\.py$"; then python -m ruff check --fix "$F" 2>/dev/null; fi; true'
bash -c 'D="$PWD"; mkdir -p "$D/docs"; CMD="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND:-}"; SHORT=$(echo "$CMD" | head -c 80); echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S) BASH $SHORT" >> "$D/docs/.builder-activity.log"; true'
